TestCase.name: testFilterOnLeftNonFilterableColumn
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s) WHERE c LIKE 'foo%'

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[LIKE($2, _UTF-16LE'foo%')]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, f0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- Calc(select=[a, d], where=[LIKE(c, 'foo%')]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable, filter=[], project=[a, c, d], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, c, d])

TestCase.name: testFilterOnLeftOnlyPushesIntoSource
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s) WHERE a > 5

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 5)]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, f0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable, filter=[>(a, 5)], project=[a, d], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, d])

TestCase.name: testFilterOnRightOnlyDoesNotReachSource
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s) WHERE s < 100

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[<($4, 100)]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, f0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[INNER], condition=[<($0, 100)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable, project=[a, d], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, d])

TestCase.name: testLeftCorrelateMixedFilterPushDown
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable LEFT JOIN UNNEST(d) AS T(s) ON TRUE WHERE a > 5 AND s < 100

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[AND(>($0, 5), <($4, 100))]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[left], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, f0 AS s], where=[<(f0, 100)]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[LEFT]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable, filter=[>(a, 5)], project=[a, d], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, d])

TestCase.name: testMixedPredicateSplitsAcrossSourceAndCorrelate
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, b, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s) WHERE a > 5 AND s < 100 AND a + s > 10

LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[AND(>($0, 5), <($4, 100), >(+($0, $4), 10))]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, b, f0 AS s], where=[>(+(a, f0), 10)]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,b,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, BIGINT b, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[INNER], condition=[<($0, 100)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable, filter=[>(a, 5)], project=[a, b, d], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, b, d])

TestCase.name: testProjectionPushDownIntoSourceWithUnnest
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s)

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, f0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable, project=[a, d], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, d])
